name: cleave_skill
description: Phase 3 skill test: champion is possessed, holds position, raiders walk in side-by-side, single Cleave (K) one-shots both at 1.5x damage. Pass = both raiders dead, champion still alive. Default champion damage 18 → cleave 27 vs 25 hp raiders = 1-shot kill.

inputs.note: raiders should be in front by now; cleave hits both
